subcodes.first_line: This is the Sacred Spot; hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the Fire of God, the Mighty, the Self-Subsisting. Forget thyself, then draw nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه بقعه القدس فاستمع لما یوحی الیک من نار الله العزیز القیوم فانس نفسک ثم آنس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
